section.heading: Rules of construction

subsection.heading: No funds to provide firearms or training

content.p: No amounts provided as a grant under this subchapter may be used for the provision to any person of a firearm or training in the use of a firearm.
Nothing in this subchapter may be construed to preclude or contradict any other provision of law authorizing the provision of firearms or training in the use of firearms.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 90–351, title I, § 2706, as added Pub. L. 115–141, div. S, title V, § 502(6), Mar. 23, 2018, 132 Stat. 1132.)
